title.ko: 측정치, 제어신호 또는 유사신호를 위한 전송방식(유체압력전송방식 F15B; 감지요소의 출력을 다른 변량으로 변환하는 기계적수단 G01D 5/00; 기계적 제어시스템 G05G)
title.en: TRANSMISSION SYSTEMS FOR MEASURED VALUES, CONTROL OR SIMILAR SIGNALS (fluid pressure transmission systems F15B; mechanical means for transferring the output of a sensing member into a different variable G01D0005000000; mechanical control systems G05G)

definition.ko: 전송계 일반 전기적; 비전기적 G08C19/00; 23/00 대상물의 위치를 전송하는 시스템 G08C21/00 전송방법에 특징이 있는 장치 다중화; 무선 전기망의 사용 G08C15/00, G08C17/00 신호의 처리 미분, 지연 G08C13/00 감시, 착오의 방지 또는 수정 G08C25/00

title.en: Arrangements for influencing the relationship between signals at input and output, e.g. differentiating, delaying
to yield a signal which is a function of two or more signals, e.g. sum or product
Arrangements characterised by the use of multiplexing for the transmission of a plurality of signals over a common path
simultaneously, i.e. using frequency division
the signals being modulated on carrier frequencies
successively, i.e. using time division
the signals being represented by amplitude of current or voltage in transmission link
the signals being represented by frequencies or phase of current or voltage in transmission link
the signals being represented by pulse characteristics in transmission link
Arrangements for transmitting signals characterised by the use of a wireless electrical link
using a radio link
using magnetically coupled devices
using capacity coupling
Electric signal transmission systems (G08C0017000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 전송되는 신호가 전류 또는 전압의 크기인 것 (G08C19/69, G08C19/38이 우선)
title.en: in which the signal transmitted is magnitude of current or voltage (G08C0019360000, G08C0019380000 take precedence)
using variable resistance
using variable inductance
differentially influencing two coils
using variable capacitance
in which the signal transmitted is frequency or phase of AC
using combination of fixed frequencies
in which transmission is by pulses
using a variable number of pulses in a train
operating on dynamo-electric devices, e.g. step motor
by varying the duration of individual pulses
using time shift of pulses
by varying pulse repetition frequency
using pulse code

title.ko: 전송이 복수의 도체 또는 채널로부터 하나 이상의 도체나 채널을 선택함으로 인하여 행하여지는 것(G08C 19/38이 우선)
title.en: in which transmission is by selection of one or more conductors or channels from a plurality of conductors or channels (G08C0019380000 takes precedence)
of one conductor or channel
of a combination of conductors or channels
using optical means to convert the input signal

title.ko: 발전기-전기 장치를 사용하는 것 (펄스에 의해 작동되는 것 G08C19/20)
title.en: using dynamo-electric devices (operated by pulses G08C0019200000)
of which only the rotor or the stator carries a winding to which a signal is applied, e.g. using step motor
having three stator poles
having more than three stator poles

title.ko: 회전자와 고정자 양쪽 모두 권선을 가진 것 (농형 회전자를 가진 것 G08C19/40)
title.en: of which both rotor and stator carry windings (having squirrel-cage rotor G08C0019400000)
being of the type with a three-phase stator and a rotor fed by constant-frequency AC, e.g. selsyn, magslip
Systems for transmitting the position of an object with respect to a predetermined reference system, e.g. tele-autographic system
Non-electric signal transmission systems, e.g. optical systems
using acoustic waves
using light waves, e.g. infrared
through light guides, e.g. optical fibres
Arrangements for preventing or correcting errors; Monitoring arrangements
by signalling back from receiving station to transmitting station
by recording transmitted signals
